headline: Should You Buy Ford Stock Now on the Energy Deal With EDF?
summary: Ford's EDF energy storage deal strengthens its long-term growth narrative, but EV losses and cost pressures still limit the stock's near-term appeal.

headline: Ford Expands Energy Storage Push With EDF Deal
summary: Deal allows EDF to buy up to 20 gigawatt-hours of storage capacity over five years.

raw.summary: Deal allows EDF to buy up to 20 gigawatt-hours of storage capacity over five years.

headline: Why hybrids are ‘having their moment’ as EVs and gas-powered vehicles lose market share
summary: Hybrids are the fastest-growing segment of the U.S. auto market as EV and gas-powered vehicle market share declines.

headline: Ford Energy and EDF Sign Major Battery Storage Supply Deal
summary: Ford Energy will supply EDF power solutions North America with access to up to 20 GWh of battery energy storage systems over five years under a new framework agreement.

raw.headline: Ford Energy and EDF Sign Major Battery Storage Supply Deal
raw.summary: Ford Energy will supply EDF power solutions North America with access to up to 20 GWh of battery energy storage systems over five years under a new framework agreement.
